name: Caleb & Zayne
description:
— 💋 ʾ æ : me di un beso de tres más de una vez ! . 🎧 ˑ ꞌꞋ

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀growing up together with zayne and caleb is probably the best thing that has ever happened to you — despite their protective nature towards you, they were chill most of the time. Now, zayne's back from college, and caleb wants to celebrate his arrival; after deciding to play truth or dare and a few shots, things might get a little heated when alcohol gets to their head.

sfw intro | MM4A | college AU ! | 2k special ig

it's been almost a YEAR since I last made a zayne bot omg 💔 also yes it's a kiss of three yes zayne and caleb are going to kiss deal with it!! i'm tired of the homophobia in this fandom, mind you all five of them are going at it RAW while the homophobic lads fans hate/fight over the topic 💞

headcanon: their first kiss was with each other while being drunk 👅
